debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] Registered ship: ' + $ship.knownname

param.name: shipName
param.comment: Current ship name that might have GT formatting

param.name: level
param.comment: Optional explicit level; falls back to pilot registry

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Pilot_Name_Tag skipped: invalid pilot object'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Pilot_Name_Tag skipped: pilot not in GT registry (' + $pilot.name + ')'

do_if.value: global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$PilotRenamingEnabled? and not @global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$ShipNaming.$PilotRenamingEnabled

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Pilot_Name_Tag skipped: PilotRenamingEnabled=false for ' + $pilot.name
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Pilot_Name_Tag skipped: vanilla XP mode active for ' + $pilot.name

'[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Pilot_Name_Tag level resolve: pilot=' + $pilot.name + ', source=' + $levelSource + ', level=' + (if $pilotLevel? then $pilotLevel else 'null') + ', regLevel=' + (if global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level else 'null') + ', regXP=' + (if global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP else 'null')
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Pilot_Name_Tag skipped: unresolved level for pilot ' + $pilot.name
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Pilot_Name_Tag base resolve: pilot=' + $pilot.name + ', source=' + $baseNameSource + ', baseName=' + $basePilotName
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Pilot_Name_Tag skipped: empty base name for pilot (id=' + (if $pilot.idcode? then $pilot.idcode else 'NONE') + ', source=' + $baseNameSource + ')'

'[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Pilot_Name_Tag raw-check: pilotId=' + (if $pilot.idcode? then $pilot.idcode else 'NONE') + ', currentRaw=' + $pilot.name + ', expectedTagged=' + $newPilotName + ', level=' + $pilotLevel + ', source=' + $baseNameSource
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Pilot_Name_Tag rename: pilotId=' + (if $pilot.idcode? then $pilot.idcode else 'NONE') + ', old=' + $pilot.name + ' -> new=' + $newPilotName
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Pilot_Name_Tag no-op: already tagged correctly (' + $pilot.name + ')'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Register_Pilot skipped: missing pilot for ship=' + (if $ship? then $ship.idcode else 'NONE')

do_if.value: $pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$OriginalShipName? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$OriginalShipName != ''

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] Stored original ship name BEFORE renaming (deterministic source): ' + $cleanedName + ' (ship=' + $ship.idcode + ')'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Registered NEW pilot: ' + $pilot.name + ' - name update result: ' + $newPilotNameResult

'[GT-ShipMgmt] Reactivated pilot: ' + $pilot.name + ' (XP: ' + (if global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP else 0) + ', Level: ' + (if global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level else 1) + ') - name update result: ' + $reactivatedNameResult
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Refreshed active pilot registration: ' + $pilot.name + ' on ' + $ship.idcode + ' - name update result: ' + $refreshNameResult
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Registered ship in Register_Pilot: ' + $ship.knownname
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Pilot ' + $pilot.name + ' resuming on SAME ship: ' + $ship.knownname + ' (ID: ' + $currentShipID + ')'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Pilot ' + $pilot.name + ' reassigned to NEW ship: ' + $ship.knownname + ' (ID: ' + $currentShipID + ', previous ID: ' + $previousShipID + ')'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Old ship cleanup check: ' + $oldShip.knownname + ' (GT order: ' + $oldShipHasGTOrder + ', Pilot: ' + $oldShipHasPilot + ')'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Old ship ' + $oldShip.knownname + ' has GT order but no pilot - cleanup handled by that ship\'s GT order'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Restored original name for old ship ' + $oldShip.knownname + ' -> ' + $oldShipOriginalName
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Old ship ' + $oldShip.knownname + ' has GT order with different pilot - no cleanup needed'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] First-time registration - pilot ' + $pilot.name + ' on ship: ' + $ship.knownname + ' (ID: ' + $currentShipID + ')'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Register_Pilot: Ship name update completed for ' + $pilot.name + ' on ' + $ship.knownname + ' (result: ' + (if $nameAlreadyUpdatedInBranch then 'branch' else $nameUpdateResult) + ')'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Updated ship status: ' + $ship.knownname + ' -> ' + $status

param.name: pilot
param.comment: Pilot override for transient swap states

param.name: use_md_system
param.comment: Prefer MD system over native game skill

param.name: allow_commander_override
param.comment: Whether commander level may raise resolved level

do_if.value: not $useVanillaXPOnly and $allow_commander_override and $ship.commander? and $ship.commander.pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.commander.pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$ship.commander.pilot}.$Level?

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] Calculate_Skill_Level returning: Level=' + $skillLevel + ', Pilot=' + $pilotName + ', UsingMD=' + $usingMDSkill

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship whose GT default order owns autoJumpDistanceByLevel

param.name: pilot
param.comment: Pilot for tier max; defaults to ship.pilot

do_if.value: not $pilot? or not $pilot.exists or not global.$GT_Pilots? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}? or not global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level?

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] AutoJumpDistance applied on ' + $ship.idcode + ' (' + $reason + '): tierMax=' + $tierMax + ', params=' + $result.$UpdatedParams.count
'[GT-ShipMgmt] WARNING: Failed to detect ship class for ' + $ship.knownname + ', defaulting to medium'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Detect_Ship_Class returning: Class=' + $shipClass + ', Size=' + $shipSize + ', Small=' + $isSmall + ', Medium=' + $isMedium + ', Large=' + $isLarge + ', Capital=' + $isCapital

set_value.name: $gtXPDebug
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_Pilots? and $new_pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$new_pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$new_pilot}.$XP? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$new_pilot}.$XP else 'NONE'

set_value.name: $gtStoredLevelDebug
set_value.exact: if global.$GT_Pilots? and $new_pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$new_pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$new_pilot}.$Level? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$new_pilot}.$Level else 'NONE'

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] ERROR: Detect_Ship_Class returned null for ' + $ship.knownname
'[GT-ShipMgmt] ERROR: Calculate_Skill_Level returned null for ' + $ship.knownname
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Cleared stale PilotExchange state for ' + $ship.idcode + ' inQueue=' + $peStatus.$IsInDirectQueue + ' activelyEngaged=' + $peStatus.$IsActivelyEngaged

'[GT-ShipMgmt] Assignment trace ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' pilot=' + $newPilotNameDbg + ' pilotId=' + $newPilotIdDbg + ' oldPilot=' + $oldPilotNameDbg + ' class=' + $classInfo.$Size + ' skill=' + $skillInfo.$Level + ' usingMD=' + $skillInfo.$UsingMDSystem + ' gtXP=' + $gtXPDebug + ' gtStoredLevel=' + $gtStoredLevelDebug + ' default=' + (if $ship.defaultorder? then @$ship.defaultorder.id else 'NONE') + ' current=' + (if $ship.order? then @$ship.order.id else 'NONE') + ' pilotExchange=' + (if global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange? then global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}.$PilotExchange else 'NONE') + ' hasGTOrder=' + $hasGTOrder + ' directProtectedGTDefault=' + $hasDirectProtectedGTDefault
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Assignment defers mod refresh for ' + $ship.idcode + ' because new pilot is not bound yet'

'[GT-ShipMgmt] Queued authoritative mod refresh for ' + $ship.knownname + ' and pilot ' + $newPilotNameDbg + ' (Skill: ' + $skillInfo.$Level + ', hasGTOrder=' + $hasGTOrder + ', directProtectedGTDefault=' + $hasDirectProtectedGTDefault + ')'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Skipped mod refresh for ' + $ship.knownname + ' (hasGTOrder=' + $hasGTOrder + ', directProtectedGTDefault=' + $hasDirectProtectedGTDefault + ')'

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship to apply performance system to

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] Performance system applied to ' + $ship.knownname + ' for pilot ' + $pilotNameDbg + ' (Level: ' + $skill_level + ')'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] ERROR: Detect_Ship_Class returned null in Calculate_Performance_Modifier for ' + $ship.knownname

do_if.value: $modsFeatureEnabled and not (global.$GT_GlobalSettings? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly? and global.$GT_GlobalSettings.$XP.$UseVanillaXPOnly) and md.GT_Ship_Modifications.GT_Compute_Desired_Modifications?

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship to get performance data for

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] WARNING: Ship ' + $ship.knownname + ' not in GT_Ships table, initializing'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Performance calculated: ' + $ship.knownname + ' - ' + $performanceInfo

do_if.value: global.$GT_Config? and global.$GT_Config.$Notifications? and global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$Level? and global.$GT_Config.$Notifications.$Level ge 1

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] DEPRECATED: Apply_Ship_Modifications called - use GT_Ship_Modification_System instead'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Ship ' + $ship.knownname + ' already has correct modifications for pilot level ' + $pilot_level
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Performance tracking updated: ' + $ship.knownname + ' - ' + $modifier + '% (Level ' + $pilot_level + ' pilot)'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] No modifications needed for ' + $ship.knownname + ' (neutral performance)'

param.name: ship
param.comment: Ship to clear modification tracking from

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] Clearing GT modification tracking for ' + $ship.knownname
'[GT-ShipMgmt] GT modification tracking cleared for ' + $ship.knownname
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Pilot change detected: ' + $ship.knownname + ' - New: ' + @$new_pilot.name + ', Old: ' + @$old_pilot.name
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Ship modifications updated for new pilot ' + $new_pilot.name + ' (Level ' + $pilotLevel + ')'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] No modifications applied - pilot not registered or missing'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] ERROR: Calculate_Rank_Title - Rank lookup failed for skillLevel=' + $skillLevel + ', rankIndex=' + $rankIndex + ', TraderTitles.count=' + global.$GT_Config.$XP.$TraderTitles.keys.count

'[GT-ShipMgmt] ERROR: Calculate_Rank_Title - Config or TraderTitles missing (Config=' + (if global.$GT_Config? then 'exists' else 'NULL') + ', XP=' + (if global.$GT_Config.$XP? then 'exists' else 'NULL') + ', TraderTitles=' + (if global.$GT_Config.$XP.$TraderTitles? then 'exists' else 'NULL') + ')'

param.name: xp
param.comment: XP value (optional, will use pilot's XP if not provided)

do_if.value: not $found and global.$GT_PilotsByStable.$i? and global.$GT_PilotsByStable.$i.keys.count gt 0
not $match and $originalName != '' and $pilotLevel? and $pilotLevel != null and $pilotLevel ge 1

set_value.name: $crewEnt
set_value.exact: if $crewTpl and $ship.roleentity? and $ship.roleentity.{$crewTpl}? and $ship.roleentity.{$crewTpl}.exists then $ship.roleentity.{$crewTpl} else null

do_if.value: not $complete and $ship and $ship.exists and $ship.pilot? and $ship.pilot.exists and $oldPilot and $oldPilot.exists and $ship.pilot != $oldPilot
not $complete and $ship and $ship.exists and $oldPilot and $oldPilot.exists and $ship.assignedaipilot? and $ship.assignedaipilot.exists and $ship.assignedaipilot != $oldPilot

debug_text.text: '[GT-DemotionDiag] BEGIN ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' attempt=' + $attempt + ' outcome=' + $outcome + ' demotionComplete=' + $demotionComplete + ' base=' + (if $baseName? then $baseName else 'NONE') + ' oldStable=' + (if $oldStable != '' then $oldStable else 'NONE') + ' oldTpl=' + (if $oldTemplate? then $oldTemplate else 'NONE') + ' newCaptainTpl=' + (if $newCaptainTemplate? then $newCaptainTemplate else 'NONE')
'[GT-DemotionDiag] slots captain=' + $captainName + ' captainStable=' + $captainStable + ' captainSeed=' + $captainSeed + ' assignedaipilot=' + $assignedAiName + ' oldPilot=' + $oldPilotNameDbg

'[GT-DemotionDiag] people people.count=' + $peopleCount + ' people.list=' + $peopleListCount + ' availablepeople.count=' + $availPeopleCount + ' unassigned.count=' + $unassignedCount + ' service.count=' + $serviceCount + ' roleentities=' + $roleEntCount + ' componentNpcs=' + $componentNpcCount

'[GT-DemotionDiag] registry regExists=' + $regExistsDbg + ' regName=' + $regNameDbg + ' regStable=' + $regStableDbg + ' rawMatch=' + $rawMatchCount + ' rawCand=' + $rawCandName + ' finalMatch=' + $finalMatchCount + ' finalCand=' + $finalCandName

'[GT-DemotionDiag] oldTplProbe people.exists=' + $peExists + ' people.name=' + $peName + ' people.seed=' + $peSeed + ' people.role=' + $peRole + ' roleentity.exists=' + $reExists + ' roleentity.name=' + $reName

'[GT-DemotionDiag] roleentity[' + $ri + ']=' + $npcName + ' stable=' + $npcStable + ' seed=' + $npcSeed + ' role=' + $npcRole + ' isPilot=' + $npcIsPilot + ' stableHit=' + $npcStableHit + ' seedHit=' + $npcSeedHit

'[GT-DemotionDiag] componentNpc[' + $ci + ']=' + $cnpcName + ' stable=' + $cnpcStable + ' seed=' + $cnpcSeed + ' role=' + $cnpcRole + ' isPilot=' + $cnpcIsPilot + ' stableHit=' + $cnpcStableHit + ' seedHit=' + $cnpcSeedHit

set_value.name: $crewEntExists
set_value.exact: if $crewTpl and $ship.roleentity? and $ship.roleentity.{$crewTpl}? and $ship.roleentity.{$crewTpl}.exists then 1 else 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-DemotionDiag] peoplePool[' + $pi + '] name=' + $crewName + ' stable=' + $crewStable + ' seed=' + $crewSeed + ' roleentity.exists=' + $crewEntExists
'[GT-DemotionDiag] END ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' attempt=' + $attempt + ' outcome=' + $outcome

set_value.name: $roleEntExists
set_value.exact: if $crewTemplate? and $crewTemplate != null and $ship.roleentity? and $ship.roleentity.{$crewTemplate}? and $ship.roleentity.{$crewTemplate}.exists then 1 else 0

set_value.name: $peopleEntryExists
set_value.exact: if $crewTemplate? and $crewTemplate != null and $ship.people? and $ship.people.{$crewTemplate}? and $ship.people.{$crewTemplate}.exists then 1 else 0

do_if.value: $peopleSeedDbg == 'NONE' and $crewTemplate? and $crewTemplate != null and $ship.people? and $ship.people.{$crewTemplate}? and $ship.people.{$crewTemplate}.seed?

param.name: pilotLevel
param.value: if $registryKey and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$registryKey}.$Level? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$registryKey}.$Level else null

debug_text.text: '[GT-SarDiag] BEGIN ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' attempt=' + $attempt + ' template=' + (if $crewTemplate? then $crewTemplate else 'NONE') + ' stable=' + (if $stableIdentity? and $stableIdentity != '' then $stableIdentity else $regStable) + ' regStatus=' + $regStatus
'[GT-SarDiag] registry regName=' + $regName + ' baseName=' + $baseName + ' liveHint=' + $liveHintName + ' roleentity.exists=' + $roleEntExists + ' roleentity.name=' + $roleEntName
'[GT-SarDiag] people entry=' + $peopleEntryExists + ' peopleSeed=' + $peopleSeedDbg + ' roleentityBySeed=' + $roleEntBySeedExists + ' unassigned.count=' + $unassignedCount

'[GT-SarDiag] ship people.list=' + $peopleListCount + ' roleentities=' + $roleEntCount + ' componentNpcs=' + $componentNpcCount + ' matchCount=' + $matchDbg.$MatchCount + ' matchCand=' + $matchDbgName

set_value.name: $cnpcRoleEntHit
set_value.exact: if $crewTemplate? and $crewTemplate != null and $ship.roleentity? and $ship.roleentity.{$crewTemplate}? and $cnpc == $ship.roleentity.{$crewTemplate} then 1 else 0

debug_text.text: '[GT-SarDiag] componentNpc[' + $ci + ']=' + $cnpcName + ' seed=' + $cnpcSeed + ' roleentityHit=' + $cnpcRoleEntHit
'[GT-SarDiag] END ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' attempt=' + $attempt

do_if.value: not $matchedNpc and $oldTemplate? and $oldTemplate != null and $ship.roleentity? and $ship.roleentity.{$oldTemplate}? and $ship.roleentity.{$oldTemplate}.exists and $npc == $ship.roleentity.{$oldTemplate}
not $matchedNpc and $oldTemplate? and $oldTemplate != null and $npc.seed? and typeof $oldTemplate != datatype.npctemplate
not $resolved and global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.keys.count gt 0

$regKey and $regKey.exists and global.$GT_Pilots.{$regKey}.$StableIdentity? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$regKey}.$StableIdentity == $stableKey and not (global.$GT_Pilots.{$regKey}.$Status? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$regKey}.$Status == 'ejected')

set_value.name: $crewEntity
set_value.exact: if $crew and $ship.roleentity? and $ship.roleentity.{$crew}? and $ship.roleentity.{$crew}.exists then $ship.roleentity.{$crew} else null

do_if.value: $crewStableMatch and not ($crewEntity and $crewEntity.exists) and $crew and $ship.roleentity? and $ship.roleentity.{$crew}? and $ship.roleentity.{$crew}.exists
$registryKey and $registryKey != $targetPilot and global.$GT_Pilots.{$registryKey}? and not global.$GT_Pilots.{$targetPilot}?

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] Rebind_Pilot_Registry merge: srcXP=' + $srcXP + ', tgtXP=' + $tgtXP + ', winner=' + (if $srcXP ge $tgtXP then 'source' else 'target') + ', pilot=' + (if $targetPilot.name? then $targetPilot.name else 'NONE')

'[GT-ShipMgmt] Reactivating PAUSED/EJECTED pilot: ' + $pilot.name + ' (status=' + (if $pilotStatus? then $pilotStatus else 'NONE') + ', XP: ' + (if global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP else 0) + ', Level: ' + (if global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$Level else 1) + ')'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Synced vanilla management skill for reactivated pilot ' + $pilot.name + ': vanilla=' + $vanillaMgmtLevel + ', gt=' + $currentSkillLevel + ' (raise-only)'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Synced vanilla management skill for active pilot ' + $pilot.name + ': vanilla=' + $vanillaMgmtLevel + ', gt=' + $currentSkillLevel + ' (raise-only)'

'[GT-ShipMgmt] Recovered pilot by StableIdentity: ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' pilot=' + $pilot.name + ' stable=' + $incomingStable + ' XP=' + (if global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP else 0)

do_if.value: global.$GT_Pilots? and global.$GT_Pilots.keys.count gt 0 and $pilot and $ship and not $stableRecovered

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] Identity recovery start ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' pilot=' + $currentPilotName + ' pilotId=' + (if $currentPilotID != '' then $currentPilotID else 'NONE') + ' allowActive=' + $allowActiveIdentityRecovery + ' registryCount=' + global.$GT_Pilots.keys.count

'[GT-ShipMgmt] Identity recovery candidate ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' currentPilot=' + $currentPilotName + ' candidate=' + $candidatePilotNameDbg + ' candidateStatus=' + $candidateStatus + ' candidatePilotId=' + (if global.$GT_Pilots.{$candidatePilot}.$PilotID? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$candidatePilot}.$PilotID != '' then global.$GT_Pilots.{$candidatePilot}.$PilotID else 'NONE') + ' candidateShipId=' + (if global.$GT_Pilots.{$candidatePilot}.$ShipID? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$candidatePilot}.$ShipID else 'NONE') + ' score=' + $score

'[GT-ShipMgmt] Recovered pilot identity after vanilla reassignment: new=' + $pilot.name + ', recoveredFrom=' + $bestCandidateNameDbg + ', XP=' + (if global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP else 0) + ', score=' + $bestScore

'[GT-ShipMgmt] Identity recovery no match ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' pilot=' + $currentPilotName + ' pilotId=' + (if $currentPilotID != '' then $currentPilotID else 'NONE') + ' bestCandidate=' + $bestCandidateNameDbg + ' bestScore=' + $bestScore + ' scoreCount=' + $bestScoreCount + ' allowActive=' + $allowActiveIdentityRecovery
'[GT-ShipMgmt] WARNING: Pilot ' + $pilot.name + ' exists but was treated as new - preserving existing XP: ' + (if global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP? then global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$XP else 0)

'[GT-ShipMgmt] Initialized NEW pilot record ship=' + $ship.idcode + ' pilot=' + $pilot.name + ' pilotId=' + (if $pilot.idcode? then $pilot.idcode else 'NONE') + ' stable=' + (if $initStable != '' then $initStable else 'NONE') + ' xp=0 level=1 allowActiveRecovery=' + $allowActiveIdentityRecovery

param.name: pilot
param.comment: Pilot to update ship name for

param.name: forceUpdate
param.comment: Force update even if pilot data missing

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] Cannot update ship name - pilot not registered: ' + $pilot.name

param.name: pilot
param.comment: Pilot (optional, derived from ship if missing)

param.name: xp
param.comment: XP value (optional, derived from pilot if missing)

param.name: level
param.comment: Skill level (optional, derived from XP if missing)

param.name: rank
param.comment: Rank title (optional, derived from level if missing)

param.name: skillLevel
param.comment: Old format: skill level (for backward compatibility)

param.name: forceUpdate
param.comment: Force update even if renaming disabled

param.name: applyName
param.comment: When true, apply name with content dedupe; always returns resolved string on success

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] Ship renaming disabled in settings - skipping rename (forceUpdate ignored)'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Ship_Name: Cannot rename - ship is null or does not exist (ship=' + (if $ship? then $ship.idcode else 'NULL') + ', exists=' + (if $ship.exists then 'yes' else 'no') + ')'

set_value.name: $pilotNameDbg
set_value.exact: if $pilot? and $pilot != null and $pilot.name? and $pilot.name != null then $pilot.name else 'NULL'

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Ship_Name: ship=' + (if $ship? then $ship.idcode else 'NULL') + ', pilot=' + $pilotNameDbg + ', ship.exists=' + (if $ship.exists then 'yes' else 'no')
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Ship_Name skipped (PE transfer in flight, incoming pilot not registered) ship=' + $ship.idcode

set_value.name: $useNewFormat
set_value.exact: $nameType != 'trader' or (($xp? and $xp != null) or ($level? and $level != null) or ($rank? and $rank != null))

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] ERROR: Rank lookup failed for level=' + $currentLevel + ', rankIndex=' + $rankIndex + ', TraderTitles.count=' + (if global.$GT_Config.$XP.$TraderTitles? then global.$GT_Config.$XP.$TraderTitles.keys.count else 'NULL') + ' (ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', pilot=' + $pilotNameDbg + ')'

'[GT-ShipMgmt] ERROR: Rank lookup failed for level=' + $currentLevel + ', rankIndex=' + $rankIndex + ', TraderTitles.count=' + (if global.$GT_Config.$XP.$TraderTitles? then global.$GT_Config.$XP.$TraderTitles.keys.count else 'NULL') + ' (ship=' + $ship.idcode + ', pilot=' + $pilotNameDbg + ')'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] (' + $ship.idcode + ') AUTHORITATIVE OVERRIDE: Setting nameType=isolated (global flag is set)'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] (' + $ship.idcode + ') AUTHORITATIVE OVERRIDE: Setting nameType=fallback (global flag is set)'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] (' + $ship.idcode + ') No authoritative override: isolatedFlag=' + $isolatedFlagSet + ', fallbackFlag=' + $fallbackFlagSet + ', using nameType=' + $nameType
'[GT-ShipMgmt] (' + $ship.idcode + ') Custom Name mode: Checking for stored name. Ship registry exists: ' + (if global.$GT_Ships? and global.$GT_Ships.{$ship}? then 'yes' else 'no')
'[GT-ShipMgmt] (' + $ship.idcode + ') Custom Name mode: Found in ship registry: ' + $originalName

do_if.value: $originalName == '' and global.$GT_Pilots? and $pilot? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}? and global.$GT_Pilots.{$pilot}.$OriginalShipName?

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] (' + $ship.idcode + ') Custom Name mode: Found in pilot registry: ' + $originalName
'[GT-ShipMgmt] (' + $ship.idcode + ') Custom Name mode: No stored name found in either registry, using macro.name: ' + $originalName
'[GT-ShipMgmt] (' + $ship.idcode + ') Unknown nameSource: ' + $nameSource + ', using macro.name: ' + $originalName
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Building name from ' + $nameSource + ': ' + $originalName

'[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Ship_Name: Building name - originalName=' + $originalName + ', nameType=' + $nameType + ', prefixElements.count=' + $prefixElements.count + ', suffixElements.count=' + $suffixElements.count
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Ship_Name: Final name built - newShipName=' + $newShipName + ', ship.exists=' + (if $ship.exists then 'yes' else 'no')
'[GalaxyTrader MK3] Ship renamed: ' + $newShipName + ' (skill level ' + $currentLevel + ', rank: ' + $rankTitle + ', XP: ' + $currentXP + ', type: ' + $nameType + ') (Ship ID: ' + $ship.idcode + ')'

'[GT-ShipMgmt] Update_Ship_Name: Cannot rename - ship no longer exists (was: ' + (if $ship? then $ship.idcode else 'NULL') + ', ship?=' + (if $ship? then 'yes' else 'no') + ', ship.exists=' + (if $ship.exists then 'yes' else 'no') + ')'

param.name: pilot
param.comment: Pilot associated with ship (optional, will use ship.pilot if not provided)

param.name: originalName
param.comment: Original name to restore (optional, will look up from pilot registry if not provided)

debug_text.text: '[GT-ShipMgmt] Restore_Original_Ship_Name skipped: ship renaming disabled'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] Restored original ship name: ' + $nameToRestore + ' (Ship ID: ' + $ship.idcode + ')'
'[GT-ShipMgmt] WARNING: Could not restore original ship name for ' + $ship.knownname + ' (Ship ID: ' + $ship.idcode + ') - original name not found'
